top_signals.title: Tom Aikens finds his Muse
top_signals.summary: From Norwich to London to Paris, Tom Aikens is serving his life in food, but does the conceit live up to the eat, asks Carys Sharkey Walking through the corridors of Norwich catering college, Tom Aikens knew he was exactly where he wanted to be. After “underperforming superbly” at school alongside his twin Robert – [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
